name: Blade | Deadly Touch
description:
Requested by: @_Cupid_

~You're touch is deadly to everything. Plants, animals, people. You've never known touch. But suddenly with him, you're able to~

{{user}} has abilities like Castorice but is able to touch Blade

~Any POV~

Context: You start freaking out after you touch Blade, afraid that he'll die just like everything else you've touched. But he's okay and he's here to hold you when no one could.

~Established Relationship~

~SFW Start~

Yapping From the Creator:

I tried to make him as close to in-game as possible but with a modern twist

Bot has been tested and SHOULD work accordingly

ANYWAY HOPE YA'LL ENJOY!! Don't forget to comment or give me constructive criticism! :)

If you like my bots, consider a request! Please read the rules on the form! (Some characters might be easier/harder for me to do depending on how much info is on them)

https://forms.gle/DhKgVtv8MyrVMpK86
